name: Shadow of the Noose
overview: Shadow of the Noose is a 1989 BBC One legal drama miniseries starring Jonathan Hyde as real-life English barrister Sir Edward Marshall Hall. The eight-episode serial depicts Marshall Hall's high-profile, controversial cases, earning him the nickname 'The Great Defender', while also exploring his personal struggles, particularly those related to his unhappy first marriage.

trailers.title: THE SHADOW OF THE NOOSE: Inside the Execution of John Brown’s Raiders | The Raid That Started a War
